note: As-built (0.20.0): the per-session attach/kill pickers + the changelog live-session dot, over the same contract.Repo (presentation/interaction only). A single flow diagram carries the signal - the change is control-flow branching (attach 0/1/>=2, kill 1 vs >=2, completion routing through binding.selected) plus the changelog dot; no new types or cross-module runtime interaction, so class/sequence would be trivial and are skipped.

diagrams.title: Per-session attach/kill pickers + changelog liveness dot (as-built)
